type(IRewardHandler).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant REWARD_FUND_HOLDER_ID = type(IRewardFundHolder).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant REWARD_STORAGE_ID = type(IRewardStorage).interfaceId;\n\nbytes4 constant BLACKLIST_MANAGER_ID = type(IBlackListManager).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant EMERGENCY_SWITCH_ID = type(IEmergencySwitch).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant TIER_CONTROLLER_ID = type(ITierController).interfaceId;\n\nbytes4 constant GRANT_POOL_ID = type(IGrantPool).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant SERVICE_FEE_COMMISSION_RECEIVER_ID = type(IServiceFeeCommissionReceiver).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant SERVICE_FEE_HANDLER_ID = type(IServiceFeeHandler).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant SERVICE_FEE_STORAGE_ID = type(IServiceFeeStorage).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant SERVICE_FEE_FUND_HOLDER_ID = type(IServiceFeeFundHolder).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant SERVICE_FEE_CONFIGURATOR_ID = type(IServiceFeeConfigurator).interfaceId;\n\nbytes4 constant SLASH_CONFIGURATOR_ID = type(ISlashConfigurator).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant SLASH_DEDUCTION_RECEIVER_ID = type(ISlashDeductionReceiver).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant SLASH_HANDLER_ID = type(ISlashHandler).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant SLASH_STORAGE_ID = type(ISlashStorage).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant TICKET_MANAGER_ID = type(ITicketManager).interfaceId;\n\nbytes4 constant RESTAKE_FEE_RECEIVER_ID = type(IRestakeFeeReceiver).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant STAKE_CONFIGURATOR_ID = type(IStakeConfigurator).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant STAKE_FUND_HOLDER_ID = type(IStakeFundHolder).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant STAKE_HANDLER_ID = type(IStakeHandler).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant STAKE_STORAGE_ID = type(IStakeStorage).interfaceId;\n\nbytes4 constant VESTING_CONFIGURATOR_ID = type(IVestingConfigurator).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant VESTING_PENALTY_RECEIVER_ID = type(IVestingPenaltyReceiver).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant VESTING_PENALTY_MANAGER_ID = type(IVestingPenaltyManager).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant VESTING_SCHEME_MANAGER_ID = type(IVestingSchemeManager).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant VESTING_STORAGE_ID = type(IVestingStorage).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant VESTING_FUND_HOLDER_ID = type(IVestingFundHolder).interfaceId;\nbytes4 constant VESTING_HANDLER_ID = type(IVestingHandler).interfaceId;\n","keccak256":"0x632b1649580d67b0ff9c629bc5477fc1e6b2df5503d17a5bb5993123f03b5596","license":"MIT"},"contracts/account/AccountHandler.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity =0.8.27;\n\nimport {\n    IRegistry,\n    IRequestVerifier,\n    IAccountHandler,\n    IAccountStorage,\n    IStakeStorage,\n    BaseService,\n    ACCOUNT_HANDLER_ID,\n    ACCOUNT_STORAGE_ID,\n    STAKE_STORAGE_ID\n} from \"../Index.sol\";\nimport {ECDSA} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/cryptography/ECDSA.sol\";\nimport {MessageHashUtils} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/cryptography/MessageHashUtils.sol\";\n\ncontract AccountHandler is IAccountHandler, BaseService {\n    constructor(IRegistry registry) BaseService(registry, ACCOUNT_HANDLER_ID) {}\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function createAccount(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.createAccount.selector);\n        (address wallet, uint256 tid, Group memory initialGroup) = abi.decode(vdata.params, (address, uint256, Group));\n        _createAccount(wallet, tid, initialGroup);\n\n        emit AccountCreated(wallet, tid, initialGroup, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function initialAccountsMigration(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verifyInitiator(vdata, this.initialAccountsMigration.selector);\n        (address[] memory wallets, uint256[] memory tids, Group[] memory initialGroups) = abi.decode(\n            vdata.params,\n            (address[], uint256[], Group[])\n        );\n        require(wallets.length == tids.length && wallets.length == initialGroups.length, \"lengths mismatch\");\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < wallets.length; i++) {\n            _createAccount(wallets[i], tids[i], initialGroups[i]);\n        }\n\n        emit AccountMigrationCompleted(wallets, tids, initialGroups, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n    }\n\n    function _createAccount(address wallet, uint256 tid, Group memory initialGroup) internal {\n        require(tid > 0, \"Invalid tid\");\n        require(wallet != address(0), \"Invalid wallet\");\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n        require(db.getWallet(tid) == address(0), \"Account already exists\");\n        require(db.getTid(wallet) == 0, \"Wallet already bound\");\n        db.bindWallet(tid, wallet);\n\n        if (initialGroup.gid > 0) {\n            require(initialGroup.tid == tid, \"Invalid initial group\");\n            _createGroup(initialGroup);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function rebindWallet(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.rebindWallet.selector);\n        (address newWallet, uint256 tid, bytes memory oldWalletSig) = abi.decode(\n            vdata.params,\n            (address, uint256, bytes)\n        );\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n\n        require(tid > 0, \"Invalid tid\");\n        address oldWallet = db.getWallet(tid);\n        require(newWallet == msg.sender, \"Permission denied\");\n        require(newWallet != oldWallet, \"Invalid new wallet\");\n        require(db.getTid(newWallet) == 0, \"Wallet already bound\");\n\n        require(oldWalletSig.length == 65, \"Invalid old wallet signature len\");\n        bytes32 dataHash = keccak256(abi.encode(block.chainid, address(this), vdata.nonce, oldWallet, newWallet, tid));\n        bytes32 hash = MessageHashUtils.toEthSignedMessageHash(dataHash);\n        require(ECDSA.recover(hash, oldWalletSig) == oldWallet, \"Invalid old wallet signature\");\n\n        emit WalletRebound(newWallet, tid, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n        db.bindWallet(tid, newWallet);\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function createGroup(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.createGroup.selector);\n        Group memory group = abi.decode(vdata.params, (Group));\n        _createGroup(group);\n\n        emit GroupCreated(group.tid, group.gid, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n    }\n\n    function _createGroup(Group memory group) internal {\n        require(!_db().isGroupExist(group.tid, group.gid), \"Group already exists\");\n        _validateAndSetGroup(group);\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function assignDelegator(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.assignDelegator.selector);\n        (uint256 tid, uint256 gid, address delegator) = abi.decode(vdata.params, (uint256, uint256, address));\n        _requireNeverStaked(tid, gid);\n        require(delegator != address(0), \"Invalid delegator\");\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n        require(db.getWallet(tid) == msg.sender, \"Permission denied\");\n        Group memory group = db.getGroup(tid, gid);\n        group.delegator = delegator;\n        emit DelegatorAssigned(delegator, tid, gid, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n        db.setGroup(group);\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function revokeDelegator(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.revokeDelegator.selector);\n        (uint256 tid, uint256 gid) = abi.decode(vdata.params, (uint256, uint256));\n        _requireNeverStaked(tid, gid);\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n        require(db.getWallet(tid) == msg.sender, \"Permission denied\");\n        Group memory group = db.getGroup(tid, gid);\n        group.delegator = address(0);\n        group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver = false;\n        group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver = false;\n        emit DelegatorRevoked(tid, gid, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n        db.setGroup(group);\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function setFeeReceiver(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.setFeeReceiver.selector);\n        (uint256 tid, uint256 gid, address feeReceiver) = abi.decode(vdata.params, (uint256, uint256, address));\n        require(tid > 0, \"Invalid tid\");\n        require(gid > 0, \"Invalid gid\");\n        require(feeReceiver != address(0), \"Invalid feeReceiver\");\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n        Group memory group = db.getGroup(tid, gid);\n        require(\n            (!group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver && db.getWallet(tid) == msg.sender) ||\n                (group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver && group.delegator == msg.sender),\n            \"Permission denied\"\n        );\n        group.feeReceiver = feeReceiver;\n        emit FeeReceiverSet(feeReceiver, tid, gid, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n        db.setGroup(group);\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function revokeFeeReceiver(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.revokeFeeReceiver.selector);\n        (uint256 tid, uint256 gid) = abi.decode(vdata.params, (uint256, uint256));\n        require(tid > 0, \"Invalid tid\");\n        require(gid > 0, \"Invalid gid\");\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n        Group memory group = db.getGroup(tid, gid);\n        require(\n            (!group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver && db.getWallet(tid) == msg.sender) ||\n                (group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver && group.delegator == msg.sender),\n            \"Permission denied\"\n        );\n        group.feeReceiver = address(0);\n        emit FeeReceiverRevoked(tid, gid, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n        db.setGroup(group);\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function setRewardReceiver(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.setRewardReceiver.selector);\n        (uint256 tid, uint256 gid, address rewardReceiver) = abi.decode(vdata.params, (uint256, uint256, address));\n        require(tid > 0, \"Invalid tid\");\n        require(gid > 0, \"Invalid gid\");\n        require(rewardReceiver != address(0), \"Invalid rewardReceiver\");\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n        Group memory group = db.getGroup(tid, gid);\n        require(\n            (!group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver && db.getWallet(tid) == msg.sender) ||\n                (group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver && group.delegator == msg.sender),\n            \"Permission denied\"\n        );\n        group.rewardReceiver = rewardReceiver;\n        emit RewardReceiverSet(rewardReceiver, tid, gid, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n        db.setGroup(group);\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function revokeRewardReceiver(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.revokeRewardReceiver.selector);\n        (uint256 tid, uint256 gid) = abi.decode(vdata.params, (uint256, uint256));\n        require(tid > 0, \"Invalid tid\");\n        require(gid > 0, \"Invalid gid\");\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n        Group memory group = db.getGroup(tid, gid);\n        require(\n            (!group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver && db.getWallet(tid) == msg.sender) ||\n                (group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver && group.delegator == msg.sender),\n            \"Permission denied\"\n        );\n        group.rewardReceiver = address(0);\n        emit RewardReceiverRevoked(tid, gid, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n        db.setGroup(group);\n    }\n\n    // @inheritdoc IAccountHandler\n    function updatePolicy(\n        uint256 tid,\n        uint256 gid,\n        bool delegatorSetFeeReceiver,\n        bool delegatorSetRewardReceiver\n    ) external override {\n        _verifier().checkRisk(this.updatePolicy.selector, msg.sender);\n        _requireNeverStaked(tid, gid);\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n        require(db.getWallet(tid) == msg.sender, \"Permission denied\");\n        Group memory group = db.getGroup(tid, gid);\n        if (delegatorSetFeeReceiver || delegatorSetRewardReceiver) {\n            require(group.delegator != address(0), \"Delegator not set\");\n        }\n        group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver = delegatorSetFeeReceiver;\n        group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver = delegatorSetRewardReceiver;\n        emit PolicyUpdated(tid, gid, delegatorSetFeeReceiver, delegatorSetRewardReceiver);\n        db.setGroup(group);\n    }\n\n    function batchUpdateGroupSettings(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.batchUpdateGroupSettings.selector);\n        Group[] memory groups = abi.decode(vdata.params, (Group[]));\n        require(groups.length > 0, \"Empty input\");\n\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < groups.length; i++) {\n            require(db.getWallet(groups[i].tid) == msg.sender, \"Permission denied\");\n            require(db.isGroupExist(groups[i].tid, groups[i].gid), \"Group not exists\");\n            _requireNeverStaked(groups[i].tid, groups[i].gid);\n            _validateAndSetGroup(groups[i]);\n        }\n        emit GroupsUpdated(groups, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n    }\n\n    function batchSetReceivers(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external override {\n        bytes32 vhash = _verifier().verify(vdata, msg.sender, this.batchSetReceivers.selector);\n        (\n            uint256[] memory tids,\n            uint256[] memory gids,\n            address[] memory feeReceivers,\n            address[] memory rewardReceivers\n        ) = abi.decode(vdata.params, (uint256[], uint256[], address[], address[]));\n        uint256 length = tids.length;\n        require(length > 0, \"Empty input\");\n        require(\n            gids.length == length && feeReceivers.length == length && rewardReceivers.length == length,\n            \"lengths mismatch\"\n        );\n\n        IAccountStorage db = _db();\n\n        Receiver[] memory receivers = new Receiver[](length);\n\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < length; i++) {\n            require(tids[i] > 0, \"Invalid tid\");\n            require(gids[i] > 0, \"Invalid gid\");\n            Group memory group = db.getGroup(tids[i], gids[i]);\n            bool isHost = db.getWallet(tids[i]) == msg.sender;\n            bool isDelegator = group.delegator == msg.sender;\n            bool canSetFee = (group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver && isDelegator) ||\n                (isHost && !group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver);\n            bool canSetReward = (group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver && isDelegator) ||\n                (isHost && !group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver);\n            require(canSetFee || canSetReward, \"Lacks permission\");\n\n            receivers[i] = Receiver({\n                feeReceiver: address(0),\n                rewardReceiver: address(0),\n                tid: tids[i],\n                gid: gids[i],\n                setFeeReceiver: false,\n                setRewardReceiver: false\n            });\n\n            if (canSetFee) {\n                group.feeReceiver = feeReceivers[i];\n\n                receivers[i].feeReceiver = feeReceivers[i];\n                receivers[i].setFeeReceiver = true;\n            } else {\n                require(feeReceivers[i] == address(0), \"Permission denied\");\n            }\n\n            if (canSetReward) {\n                group.rewardReceiver = rewardReceivers[i];\n\n                receivers[i].rewardReceiver = rewardReceivers[i];\n                receivers[i].setRewardReceiver = true;\n            } else {\n                require(rewardReceivers[i] == address(0), \"Permission denied\");\n            }\n\n            db.setGroup(group);\n        }\n\n        emit ReceiversSet(receivers, vdata.nonce, vhash);\n    }\n\n    function _validateAndSetGroup(Group memory group) internal {\n        require(group.tid > 0, \"Invalid tid\");\n        require(group.gid > 0, \"Invalid gid\");\n        if (group.delegator != address(0)) {\n            require(!group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver || group.feeReceiver == address(0), \"Logical conflict\");\n            require(!group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver || group.rewardReceiver == address(0), \"Logical conflict\");\n        } else {\n            require(!group.delegatorSetFeeReceiver && !group.delegatorSetRewardReceiver, \"Delegator not set\");\n        }\n        _db().setGroup(group);\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Returns the group information.\n    function getGroup(uint256 tid, uint256 gid) external view override returns (Group memory) {\n        return _db().getGroup(tid, gid);\n    }\n\n    /// @notice returns the address of the account storage\n    function _db() private view returns (IAccountStorage) {\n        return IAccountStorage(_registry.getAddress(ACCOUNT_STORAGE_ID));\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Once active staking has occurred within a group, neither the delegator settings nor the group configurations can be modified.\n    function _requireNeverStaked(uint256 tid, uint256 gid) private view {\n        require(tid > 0, \"Invalid tid\");\n        require(gid > 0, \"Invalid gid\");\n        IStakeStorage staking = IStakeStorage(_registry.getAddress(STAKE_STORAGE_ID));\n        require(!staking.isStaked(tid, gid), \"Group is staked before\");\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0xfdb58408870a2593b80168693f88ab6c32b7c1966b1b31fc5e1b43aaaecf4c4e","license":"MIT"},"contracts/account/IAccountHandler.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity =0.8.27;\n\nimport {IRequestVerifier} from \"../base/IRequestVerifier.sol\";\n\n/// @title Account Handler Interface\ninterface IAccountHandler {\n    /// @notice Emitted when a new account is created\n    event AccountCreated(address indexed wallet, uint256 tid, Group initialGroup, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when an account is migrated\n    event AccountMigrationCompleted(\n        address[] indexed wallets,\n        uint256[] tids,\n        Group[] initialGroups,\n        uint64 nonce,\n        bytes32 vhash\n    );\n    /// @notice Emitted when a wallet is rebound\n    event WalletRebound(address indexed wallet, uint256 tid, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when a new group is created\n    event GroupCreated(uint256 tid, uint256 gid, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when a group migration is completed\n    event GroupMigrationCompleted(Group[] groups, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when a delegator is assigned to a group\n    event DelegatorAssigned(address indexed delegator, uint256 tid, uint256 gid, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when a delegator is revoked from a group\n    event DelegatorRevoked(uint256 tid, uint256 gid, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when a fee receiver is set for a group\n    event FeeReceiverSet(address indexed receiver, uint256 tid, uint256 gid, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when a fee receiver is revoked from a group\n    event FeeReceiverRevoked(uint256 tid, uint256 gid, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when a reward receiver is set for a group\n    event RewardReceiverSet(address indexed receiver, uint256 tid, uint256 gid, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when a reward receiver is revoked from a group\n    event RewardReceiverRevoked(uint256 tid, uint256 gid, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when a policy is updated\n    event PolicyUpdated(uint256 tid, uint256 gid, bool delegatorSetFeeReceiver, bool delegatorSetRewardReceiver);\n    /// @notice Emitted when group settings are updated\n    event GroupsUpdated(Group[] groups, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n    /// @notice Emitted when receivers are set\n    event ReceiversSet(Receiver[] receivers, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n\n    struct Group {\n        uint256 tid;\n        uint256 gid;\n        address delegator;\n        address feeReceiver;\n        address rewardReceiver;\n        bool delegatorSetFeeReceiver;\n        bool delegatorSetRewardReceiver;\n    }\n\n    struct Receiver {\n        address feeReceiver;\n        address rewardReceiver;\n        uint256 tid;\n        uint256 gid;\n        bool setFeeReceiver;\n        bool setRewardReceiver;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice create a new account\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function createAccount(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice rebind a wallet to a new account\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function rebindWallet(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice create a new group\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function createGroup(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice assign a delegator to a group\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function assignDelegator(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice revoke a delegator from a group\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function revokeDelegator(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice set a fee receiver for a group\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function setFeeReceiver(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice revoke a fee receiver from a group\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function revokeFeeReceiver(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice set a reward receiver for a group\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function setRewardReceiver(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice revoke a reward receiver from a group\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function revokeRewardReceiver(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice update a policy\n    /// @param tid the account tid\n    /// @param gid the group id\n    /// @param delegatorSetFeeReceiver whether delegator can set fee receiver\n    /// @param delegatorSetRewardReceiver whether delegator can set reward receiver\n    function updatePolicy(\n        uint256 tid,\n        uint256 gid,\n        bool delegatorSetFeeReceiver,\n        bool delegatorSetRewardReceiver\n    ) external;\n\n    /// @notice batch update group settings\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function batchUpdateGroupSettings(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice batch set receivers\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function batchSetReceivers(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice get the group information\n    /// @param tid the account tid\n    /// @param gid the group id\n    function getGroup(uint256 tid, uint256 gid) external view returns (Group memory);\n\n    /// @notice initial account migration\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function initialAccountsMigration(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n}\n","keccak256":"0xd77d535ed5c06aff2bc52526bd789eaa04b564d32da2528c51db40b3b2fc3457","license":"MIT"},"contracts/account/IAccountStorage.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity =0.8.27;\n\nimport {IAccountHandler} from \"./IAccountHandler.sol\";\n\n/// @title the interface for account storage\ninterface IAccountStorage {\n    /// @notice update the account information\n    /// @param tid the account tid\n    /// @param wallet the account wallet\n    function bindWallet(uint256 tid, address wallet) external;\n\n    /// @notice get the account information\n    /// @param tid the account tid\n    /// @return wallet the account wallet\n    function getWallet(uint256 tid) external view returns (address wallet);\n\n    /// @notice get the account tid\n    /// @param wallet the account wallet\n    /// @return tid the account tid\n    function getTid(address wallet) external view returns (uint256 tid);\n\n    /// @notice set the account group\n    /// @param group the account group\n    function setGroup(IAccountHandler.Group memory group) external;\n\n    /// @notice get the account group\n    /// @param tid the account tid\n    /// @param gid the group id\n    /// @return group the account group\n    function getGroup(uint256 tid, uint256 gid) external view returns (IAccountHandler.Group memory group);\n\n    /// @notice check if the account group exists\n    /// @param tid the account tid\n    /// @param gid the group index\n    /// @return true if the group exists\n    function isGroupExist(uint256 tid, uint256 gid) external view returns (bool);\n}\n","keccak256":"0xaa82b478dbe16e4ea9aefdddef13ebbb7c8404b09f049edb15bbda6035d7c685","license":"MIT"},"contracts/account/IKYCWhitelist.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity =0.8.27;\n\nimport {IRequestVerifier} from \"../base/IRequestVerifier.sol\";\n\n/// @title the interface for kyc whitelist\ninterface IKYCWhitelist {\n    /// @notice Emitted when a kyc whitelist updated\n    event KYCUpdated(address[] wallets, bool[] verified, uint64 nonce, bytes32 vhash);\n\n    /// @notice update kyc whitelist\n    /// @param vdata the verifiable data\n    function updateKYC(IRequestVerifier.VerifiableData calldata vdata) external;\n\n    /// @notice check receiver is verified against the KYC whitelist\n    /// @param receiver the token receiver's wallet address\n    /// @return verified true if the wallet is verified\n    function checkKYC(address receiver) external returns (bool MIT\npragma solidity =0.8.27;\n\n/// @notice Vesting types\nenum VestingType {\n    Stake,\n    Unstake,\n    ServiceFee,\n    Reward\n}\n\n/// @notice Vesting record\n/// @param amounts array of amounts\n/// @param vestingDays array of vesting days\n\nstruct VestingRecord {\n    uint256[] amounts;\n    uint32[] vestingDays;\n}\n\ninterface IVestingHandler {\n    /// @notice Emitted when a new vesting schedule is created\n    /// @dev beneficiary is the wallet who will receive the vested tokens,\n    /// beneficiary can be address(0) if the vested tokens go to the host\n    event VestingCreated(\n        address indexed beneficiary,\n        VestingType vestingType,\n        uint256 tid,\n        uint256 gid,\n        VestingRecord records\n    );\n\n    /// @notice Emitted when vested tokens are released\n    /// @dev beneficiary is the wallet who will receive the vested tokens,\n    /// beneficiary can be address(0) if the vested tokens go to the host\n    event VestingReleased(\n        address indexed beneficiary,\n        VestingType vestingType,\n        uint256 tid,\n        uint256 gid,\n        VestingRecord records\n    );\n\n    /// @notice Emitted when vested tokens are restaked\n    event VestingRestaked(\n        address indexed delegator,\n        uint256 tid,\n        uint256 gid,\n        VestingRecord records,\n        uint256 restakeFeeAmount\n    );\n\n    /// @notice Emitted when vested tokens are early claimed\n    /// @dev beneficiary is the wallet who will receive the vested tokens,\n    /// beneficiary can be address(0) if the vested tokens go to the host\n    event EarlyClaimed(\n        address indexed beneficiary,\n        VestingType vestingType,\n        uint256 tid,\n        uint256 gid,\n        VestingRecord records,\n        uint256 penaltyAmount,\n        uint256 penaltyPercentage,\n        uint256 earlyClaimDays\n    );\n\n    /// @notice Emitted when vested tokens are slashed\n    event VestingSlashed(\n        address indexed host,\n        VestingType vestingType,\n        uint256 tid,\n        uint256 gid,\n        VestingRecord records\n    );\n\n    /// @notice Create a new vesting schedule\n    /// @param vestingType type of vesting\n    /// @param tid user tid\n    /// @param gid group id\n    /// @param amount amount to vest\n    function createVesting(VestingType vestingType, uint256 tid, uint256 gid, uint256 amount) external;\n\n    /// @notice Create a new vesting schedule with custom amounts and vesting days\n    /// @param vestingType type of vesting\n    /// @param tid user tid\n    /// @param gid group id\n    /// @param record vesting record\n    function initialVesting(VestingType vestingType, uint256 tid, uint256 gid, VestingRecord calldata record) external;\n\n    /// @notice Claim vested tokens\n    /// @param tids user tids\n    /// @param gids group ids\n    /// @param fees vesting record\n    /// @param rewards vesting record\n    /// @param stakes vesting record\n    function releaseHostVestedToken(\n        uint256[] calldata tids,\n        uint256[] calldata gids,\n        VestingRecord[] calldata fees,\n        VestingRecord[] calldata rewards,\n        VestingRecord[] calldata stakes\n    ) external;\n\n    /// @notice Release vested tokens to delegator\n    /// @param tids user tid\n    /// @param gids group id\n    /// @param stakes vesting record\n    function releaseDelegatorVestedToken(\n        uint256[] calldata tids,\n        uint256[] calldata gids,\n        VestingRecord[] calldata stakes\n    ) external;\n\n    /// @notice Release vested tokens to stake fund holder for restake\n    /// @param tid user tid\n    /// @param gid group id\n    /// @param stakes vesting record\n    /// @dev This function is called by StakeHandler\n    function restakeVestedToken(\n        uint256 tid,\n        uint256 gid,\n        VestingRecord calldata stakes,\n        uint256 restakeFeeAmount\n    ) external;\n\n    /// @notice Release vested tokens to receiver\n    /// @param tids user tid\n    /// @param gids group id\n    /// @param fees vesting record\n    /// @param rewards vesting record\n    function releaseReceiverVestedToken(\n        uint256[] calldata tids,\n        uint256[] calldata gids,\n        VestingRecord[] calldata fees,\n        VestingRecord[] calldata rewards\n    ) external;\n\n    /// @notice Host early claim\n    /// @param tids user tid\n    /// @param gids group id\n    /// @param vestingTypes vesting type\n    /// @param records vesting record\n    function
